message:
chore: sync beads issues.jsonl and lockfile drift

Routine working-tree sync of two small, non-destructive changes that
piled up alongside the u64::MAX fencing-token fix commit (1de6f11e):

- .beads/issues.jsonl: single-line metadata update from a background
  bd sync, capturing the most recent status/dependency state for the
  existing issue set (no issues added or removed).
- Cargo.lock: asupersync picked up crc32fast as a transitive dep via
  a workspace resolver pass; no direct manifest change and no other
  packages affected.

Both files are generated/synced artifacts — committing them keeps the
working tree clean so follow-up changes don't drag unrelated noise
into their diffs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
